summaryFragments.noAddress: If you are arriving soon and do not yet have a stable address, your first week focuses on tracking address-dependent tasks and preparing for registration once you have housing.
summaryFragments.hasAddress: If you already have an address, your early days centre on municipality registration, BSN and setting up daily essentials.
summaryFragments.bankingSoon: Because you need banking soon, account setup and payment readiness stay near the top of your plan.
summaryFragments.withKids: With kids, include school and family admin earlier so your first month is less rushed.
summaryFragments.regionalMove: As this looks like a regional move, your timeline may feel more compressed; sequencing still matters.
summaryFragments.longDistanceMove: As this looks like a longer-distance move, keep extra buffer for coordination and first-week admin.
